creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
On 15:50 Tue 25 May, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/146970'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
> 
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=146970

Could anyone please take on this PR? I'd like to see the fixes commited
before 8.1-RELEASE freeze. Or do we have any problems here?

> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       net/csync2 - fix rc.d script error, update and take maintainership.
> >Arrival-Date:   Tue May 25 15:50:00 UTC 2010

Thanks,
-- 
Alexey V. Degtyarev
